name: omnipascal
description: Delphi and FPC support. Including code completion, declaration support, outlining, snippets, syntax highlighting and more.

omnipascal.delphiInstallationPath.description: Path to the Delphi installation. Example: C:\Program Files (x86)\Embarcadero\Studio\18.0. If this value is empty, OmniPascal will try to find the path by itself.

omnipascal.freePascalSourcePath.description: Path to the Free Pascal source files. Example: C:\lazarus\fpc\3.0.0

omnipascal.defaultDevelopmentEnvironment.description: Defines the default development environment when no project is loaded

omnipascal.searchPath.description: Search paths in addition to "omnipascal.delphiInstallationPath"/"omnipascal.freePascalSourcePath" and the current workspace. Separate paths with ';'. TIP: Paths ending with '*' will include all subdirectories recursively!

omnipascal.msbuildPath.description: Full path to MSBuild.exe used to build a Delphi .dproj file. If this value is empty, OmniPascal will try to find the path by itself.

omnipascal.lazbuildPath.description: Full path to lazbuild.exe used to build a Lazarus .lpi file.

omnipascal.createBuildScripts.description: Specifies whether OmniPascal will create tasks.json and a build script when a project is loaded

omnipascal.symbolIndex.description: Defines the locations that will be indexed in background after startup. The index will be used for add-uses-quickfixes when a symbol name can't be resolved and the "Go to Symbol in Workspace" feature.

omnipascal.usesListStyle.description: Defines how units will be added to uses clauses.

omnipascal.namingConventionString.description: Defines the naming convention for the String type used in code completion and hints. (pascalCase => String | camelCase => string)
